response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned generalist with deep experience in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/full-stack work, but lacks the core mandatory qualifications for this role: there is no evidence of substantial C++ development experience on Windows (only a brief ~6-month C/C++ stint at National Instruments in 2007-2008), no SQL Server or Oracle experience, and no exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains. The mandatory C++/Windows requirement (5-10 years) and financial-services domain expertise are both effectively unmet.
strengths: Strong overall engineering breadth across backend, full-stack, and infrastructure
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
Excellent written communication evidenced by talks, workshops, and teaching
concerns: No substantial recent C++ experience; only ~6 months on C/C++ in 2007-2008
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; primary DB exposure is MongoDB/MySQL
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience

key_factors.factor: No fixed income / capital markets domain
No SQL Server or Oracle experience
